message:
chore: remove unused imports, fix unused variables, and add missing clone assertions

- disruption_scorecard_enrichment_integration.rs: remove unused BTreeMap,
  DimensionScore, HistoryEntry imports
- observability_quality_sentinel_integration.rs: remove unused DemotionRule,
  DimensionState imports; prefix 6 unused variables with _; change unused
  loop variable to _
- parser_grammar_closure_backlog.rs: remove trailing newline at EOF
- control_plane_benchmark_split_gate.rs: add missing assertions verifying
  original.p99_ns and original.throughput_ops_per_sec after mutation in
  clone independence tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
